ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_length" TEXT /* Length of the product */,
  "product_width" TEXT /* Width of the product */,
  "product_height" TEXT /* Height of the product */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the product */,
  "product_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "product_review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product associated with this variation */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier for the variation */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the variation */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity in stock */,
  "variation_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the variation */,
  "variation_length" TEXT /* Length of the variation */,
  "variation_width" TEXT /* Width of the variation */,
  "variation_height" TEXT /* Height of the variation */,
  "variation_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the variation image */,
  "variation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  "category_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for customer authentication */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the cart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cart was created */,
  "cart_status" TEXT /* Status of the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cart containing this item */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variation added to the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units of this variation in the cart */,
  "cart_item_status" TEXT /* Status of the cart item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES product_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "order_shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this item belongs to */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variation ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this variation ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of this variation at the time of the order */,
  "order_item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES product_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-product relationship */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being supplied */,
  "supplier_product_price" TEXT /* Price of the product supplied by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_roles" (
  "customer_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-role relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the customer */,
  "customer_role_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_roles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
